india_trends.title: US Treasuries Rally as Falling Oil Boosts Interest Rate-Cut Bets
india_trends.summary: Treasuries gained to wrap up a choppy week of war-driven swings, as easing tensions in the Middle East drove oil lower and prompted traders to boost wagers that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates this year.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq end at fresh records as oil prices tumble
india_trends.summary: Major Wall Street indices rocketed to fresh records Friday after Iran's announcement reopening the Strait of Hormuz sent oil prices sharply lower.

india_trends.summary: TEXPROCIL has responded to US investigations on excess manufacturing capacity and forced labor. india_trends.summary: Visa is reportedly appointing Suresh Sethi, former CEO of Protean eGov Technologies, as its new India country head. india_trends.title: Govt revisits plan to raise wage cap for PF coverage
india_trends.summary: The government is considering a significant increase in the provident fund wage ceiling. Current limits may rise to ₹25,000 or ₹30,000 monthly from ₹15,000. india_trends.title: 15 banks get government nod to import gold & silver for 3 years
india_trends.summary: India has authorized 17 banks to import gold and silver. This authorization is effective for three years from April 1, 2026. india_trends.title: Vedanta Resources seeks $200 million loan top-up after $350 million deal earlier this year
india_trends.summary: Vedanta Resources is looking to boost its existing $350 million loan by at least $200 million. The company is in talks with Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corp. and First Abu Dhabi Bank to join the facility. This move aims to refinance obligations, cover transaction costs, and support general corporate nee

india_trends.title: India-China SCO talks focus on trade security, connectivity under first bilateral consultations
india_trends.summary: India and China held their first bilateral consultations on the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation in New Delhi. Both nations agreed to enhance cooperation on security, trade, and regional connectivity. Discussions focused on implementing SCO leaders' decisions and the organization's future direction

india_trends.title: Exporters seek removal of cap on interest subvention
india_trends.summary: Indian exporters are calling on the government to lift the cap on interest subvention. They state current support is insufficient to counter rising global trade uncertainties. The Federation of Indian Export Organisations believes the subsidy scheme needs revision. This aims to provide more substant

india_trends.title: Corporate Affairs ministry proposes easing company incorporation rules
india_trends.summary: In an effort to boost entrepreneurship, the corporate affairs ministry is poised to revamp the company incorporation process. By consolidating numerous forms into a reduced set of e-forms, the ministry aims to slash bureaucratic red tape. Expect a more lenient approach to KYC protocols and documenta

india_trends.title: US Stocks|Drone maker AEVEX valued at $2.6 billion as shares rise in NYSE debut
india_trends.summary: AEVEX made a striking entrance on the New York Stock Exchange, with its shares jumping 15% on debut. This significant increase points to a heightened investor enthusiasm for companies in the defense industry, especially given the current global unrest.

india_trends.title: Singapore emerges as top FDI source in Apr-Dec FY26, high inflows from tax havens
india_trends.summary: Singapore emerged as the top source of FDI equity inflows into India during April-December FY26, contributing $17.6 billion. india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold jumps $109/oz, silver surges $4.5/oz as Strait of Hormuz reopens
india_trends.summary: Precious metals saw gains on 17 April as safe-haven sentiment improved after Iran reopened the Strait of Hormuz, easing inflation concerns. Gold rose $109 to $4,917 and silver surged $4.53 to $83.24.&nbsp;
